  • Changelog

    utilrep2

    Include functions created or extracted for reproducing reports: https://github.com/CoVPN/correlates_reporting2.git

    Installation 

    # install.packages("pak")
pak::pkg_install("local::.")

    Or using renv inside the project:

    renv::install(".")

    Or from a downloaded .tar.gz file:

    install.packages("/path/to/utilrep2_x.x.x.tar.gz", repos = NULL, type = "source")

    Overview

    utilrep2 provides an R interface to the correlates_reporting2 pipeline — a multi-module system for vaccine correlates-of-risk (CoR), correlates-of-protection (CoP), and immunogenicity analyses.

    The package is organised into three families:

    Family Pipeline function Modules
    Immunogenicity run_immuno_analysis() run_immuno_tabular(), run_immuno_graphical()
    Correlates of risk run_cor_analysis() run_cor_coxph(), run_cor_graphical(), run_cor_tabular(), run_cor_nonlinear(), and more
    Correlates of protection run_cop_analysis() run_cop_stochastic(), run_cop_mediation(), run_cop_binaryprinstrat()

    Quick start 

    library(utilrep2)

# Configure once per session
setup_session(
  trial       = "moderna_mock",
  report_root = "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
)

# Run a full analysis pipeline
run_cor_analysis()

# Or individual modules
run_cor_coxph(report = FALSE)
run_cor_graphical()

    Session configuration

    Function Purpose
    setup_session() Set trial, platform, and root paths in one call
    set_platform() / get_platform() Switch between "linux" and "win" script routing
    set_report_root() / get_report_root() Override the project root path
    set_output_root() / get_output_root() Redirect module output to a separate tree
    set_data_root() / get_data_root() Redirect input data reads

    OS compatibility audit

    Before running the pipeline on Windows, audit the repository for Unix-only code patterns and packages:

    result <- check_os_compatibility(root = here::here())
print(result)

    Documentation

    Full package documentation is available at: https://yh202109.github.io/utilrep2/index.html

    Vignettes 

    vignette("getting-started",   package = "utilrep2")
vignette("running-pipelines", package = "utilrep2")
vignette("os-compatibility",  package = "utilrep2")

    AI assistance

    Portions of this package — including documentation, code structure, and the Windows compatibility audit tooling — were developed with the assistance of Posit Assistant, an AI coding assistant.

    Related project

    The analysis modules that this package orchestrates live in:

    CoVPN/correlates_reporting2 https://github.com/CoVPN/correlates_reporting2
